subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him whose letter hath come before the Countenance in this Prison, whose very atoms bear witness that He is come [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن حضر کتابه لدی الوجه فی هذا السجن الذی شهدت ذراته قد اتی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
